Author: AEBus
Name: FFXIV Venues Directory
Description: Discover open FFXIV venues by region, data center, world, tags, and schedule. View detailed venue cards with addresses, banners, and external links directly in-game.
Punchline: Browse FFXIV roleplay venues in-game with rich filters and schedules.
Changelog:
Window resizing update.

- The directory window can now be resized larger while keeping 1280x720 as the minimum supported size.
- Corrected window sizing values so Dalamud applies UI scaling consistently.
